expectations.text: Defines WowAggregate type for user aggregate

expectations.text: Handles CreateUserCommand with proper state creation

handleUpdateUser method at lines 260-306 handles state transitions with validation
handleDeleteUser method at lines 309-333 implements soft delete by setting deleted: true
All handlers return CommandResult type - see createSuccessResult (lines 368-397) and createErrorResult (lines 402-431)

expectations.text: Includes TypeScript typing for commands and state

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions, evals look solid. Comprehensive implementation with proper DDD patterns.
